keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Iraq 0, Norway 1. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by David Møller Wolfe with a cross.
Goal! Iraq 1, Norway 1. Aymen Hussein (Iraq) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Amir Al Ammari with a cross.
Goal! Iraq 1, Norway 2. Erling Haaland (Norway) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
First Half ends, Iraq 1, Norway 2.
Second Half begins Iraq 1, Norway 2.
Delay in match because of an injury Ali Jasim (Iraq).
Substitution, Iraq. Zidane Iqbal replaces Zaid Ismael.
Substitution, Iraq. Marko Farji replaces Ali Al Hamadi.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Ali Jasim (Iraq).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Norway. Andreas Schjelderup replaces Antonio Nusa.
Substitution, Norway. Kristian Thorstvedt replaces Fredrik Aursnes.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces David Møller Wolfe because of an injury.
Substitution, Iraq. Mustafa Saadoon replaces Hussein Ali.
Substitution, Iraq. Ahmed Qasem replaces Ali Jasim because of an injury.
Goal! Iraq 1, Norway 3. Leo Østigård (Norway) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Iraq. Mohanad Ali replaces Ibrahim Bayesh.
Substitution, Norway. Patrick Berg replaces Martin Ødegaard.
Zaid Tahseen (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Aymen Hussein (Iraq).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Own Goal by Aymen Hussein, Iraq. Iraq 1, Norway 4.
Second Half ends, Iraq 1, Norway 4.
